message.content:
Review the controller, manageback controller, consumer, and scheduled task changes. Run:
`cd D:/project/pt-gitlab/collabspace/collabspace-server && git diff master...HEAD -- src/main/java/com/yottastudios/ns/collabspace/announcement/controller/ src/main/java/com/yottastudios/ns/collabspace/manageback/ src/main/java/com/yottastudios/ns/collabspace/announcement/consumer/ src/main/java/com/yottastudios/ns/collabspace/announcement/task/`

Also read the full current versions of:
- AnnouncementController.java
- ManagebackAnnouncementController.java  
- AnnouncementConsumer.java
- AnnouncementExpireTask.java

Path base: D:/project/pt-gitlab/collabspace/collabspace-server/src/main/java/com/yottastudios/ns/collabspace/

Analyze for:
1. Are all endpoints properly secured (permission annotations)?
2. Are request parameters validated (@Valid, @NotNull)?
3. Is the manageback controller properly separated from user-facing controller?
4. Consumer error handling and idempotency
5. Scheduled task: proper locking (ShedLock?), error handling, edge cases
6. REST API design: proper HTTP methods, response codes, naming conventions

Return a detailed analysis with specific line numbers.
